subject: Human Resources
title: Change Management
description: Learn Change Management in one minute.

hook.text: A company rolls out a new system. Nobody was told why. Employees ignore it. The project fails.

buildup.text: Change management helps organizations transition people through new processes, structures, or technologies.

discovery.text: The key insight: people don't resist change itself—they resist being changed without understanding why.

twist.text: 70% of organizational change efforts fail. The main reason isn't bad planning—it's poor communication.

climax.text: Successful change requires early communication, involvement, training, and visible leadership support.

punchline.text: Change succeeds when people understand the why.

quiz.question: Why do most change efforts fail?
options: Poor communication and lack of employee involvement
The changes are always bad ideas
